creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: Randy, you are correct that "service netif restart lagg0" will destroy the cloned interface.  I just didn't realize that suspending restarted network interfaces.  In any case, you're panic isn't directly in the lagg or inet6 code.  That's why I want to see the exact panic string.  I may need access to the core file too, if you're willing and able to provide it.
